calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Denied

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Kathy Kollehner, CSR #4102.
Scott Peebles, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Mark Rutherford, Trustee for the Shizuo Holdings Trust.
Mark Rutherford, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined by Mr. Peebles.
No appearance by defendants Sean McNorton and Richard Bates.
Default entered against Sean McNorton on January 16, 208.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: Residential Tenancy Agreement dated 03/18/06................... ID/EV
Exhibit 2: Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Surrender Possession
dated 12/01/07..................................................ID/EV
Exhibit 3: Declaration of Service of Notices dated 12/10/07................ ID/EV

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mark Rutherford, Trustee for the Shizuo Holdings Trust, and against Defendants SEAN MCNORTON AND RICHARD BATES as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendants SEAN MCNORTON and RICHARD BATES Rents and Per Diem Damages in the sum of $6,933.10 and Costs in the amount of 410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $7,343.10.
Plaintiff Mark Rutherford, Trustee for the Shizuo Holdings Trust is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 464 Haight Street, (top unit) San Francisco, CA 94117. The lease is forfeited.
Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cindy Lee, counsel for plaintiff Mark Rutherford Trustee for the Shizuo Holdings Trust

No appearance by defendant Richard Bates.

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
